# terrible_dellemc_powerflex_resource_group (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `clone_node` (String) Resource to duplicate during scaleup, if more than one nodes are available in the resource group.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of the resource group.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `firmware_repository_id` (String) The ID of the firmware repository if not using the appliance default catalog. Mutually exclusive with *firmware_repository_name*.
- `firmware_repository_name` (String) The name of the firmware repository if not using the appliance default catalog. Mutually exclusive with *firmware_repository_id*.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `new_resource_group_name` (String) New name of the resource group to rename to.
- `node_count` (Number) Number of nodes to clone during scaleup.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `resource_group_id` (String) The ID of the resource group. Either *resource_group_id* or *resource_group_name* must be specified to perform resource group operations. Mutually exclusive with *resource_group_name*.
- `resource_group_name` (String) The name of the resource group. This is a required field to deploy a resource group. Either *resource_group_id* or *resource_group_name* must be specified to perform resource group operations. Mutually exclusive with *resource_group_id*.
- `scaleup` (Boolean) Whether to scale up the resource group. Specify as true to add nodes to the resource group.
- `schedule_date` (String) Scheduled date for the resource group deployment. Specify in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.sss or YYYY-MM-DD format.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) The state of the resource group.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `template_id` (String) The ID of the published template. Either *template_id* or *template_name* must be specified to deploy a resource group. Mutually exclusive with *template_name*.
- `template_name` (String) The name of the published template. Either *template_id* or *template_name* must be specified to deploy a resource group. Mutually exclusive with *template_id*.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `validate` (Boolean) Specify as true to validate the deployment of resource group.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `resource_group_details` (String) Details of the resource group deployment.
